_note: Station indices are 0-based. Labels override controller names (which are unavailable via OTC API). grant_zone controls which zone is highlighted by default on the water-usage page.

crop_splits._note: Estimated per-crop sub-metering of a zone's gallons for grant reporting. Applied per unit of watering time: crops with 'fixed_gph' draw that many gallons per hour of the zone's run time; the remaining gallons are split among 'remainder_pct' crops. Percentages must sum to 1.0. Estimates only (not independently metered).
